_meta.description: Canonical trading mode mapping for TradingSquad AI skills and API scripts.
_meta.note: Single source of truth — referenced by AGENTS.md, docs/USER_GUIDE.md, and SKILL.md files.

modes.label: Intraday / Scalping
modes.context: VWAP, 1H/15m timeframe, fast momentum, live tape reading
example_prompts: Analisis ADRO untuk scalping hari ini
Cek momentum BBCA buat day trade
Apakah BREN kuat naik sampai penutupan sesi 2?

modes.label: Short Swing
modes.context: Daily (1D) chart, MA10/MA20, short-term accumulation, 15m/1h structure
example_prompts: Gimana prospek BUMI buat 2 minggu ke depan?

modes.label: Swing / Medium Term
example_prompts: Proyeksi harga BRPT 3 bulan ke depan
Apakah aman hold ASII sampai kuartal depan?

modes.label: Long Term / Investing
modes.context: Weekly/Monthly chart, MA200, fundamental fair value, macro trends
example_prompts: Analisis long term BBRI buat nabung saham
Fundamental check INDF untuk hold 2 tahun
